B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 22 

r_im_pneum: REVERSED: Ever had a Pneumonia shot 

SAS Format: YND 

1: NO 

2: YES 

r_md_change: REVERSED: how likely to change doctors if dissatisfied with dr communication 

SAS Format: LIKER 

1: VERY UNLIKELY 

2: UNLIKELY 

3: LIKELY 

4: VERY LIKELY 

r_md_disagree: REVERSED: how likely to tell doctor you disagree with him or her 

SAS Format: LIKER 

1: VERY UNLIKELY 

2: UNLIKELY 

3: LIKELY 

4: VERY LIKELY 

r_md_getmngca: REVERSED: last 6 mths, got
